name: 17p13_subtelomeric_SD
description: 17pter subtelomeric SD cluster — small but recurrent duplicons in the most distal 17p, including RPH3AL and ABR paralog content. Mediates rare 17p-subtelomeric microdeletions in addition to the larger 17p13.3 (LIS1) interval.

architecture.internal_structure: Subtelomeric SD blocks of ~10-50 kb at ~95-97% identity; tandem RPH3AL/ABR paralog cassettes; partly assembled in GRCh38.
